2026-06-11HCPatent ActDesignation of a Vice-Chairperson of the Patented Medicine Prices Review BoardDesignation of Peter Moreland-Giraldeau of Canmore, Alberta, a member of the Patented Medicine Prices Review Board, as Vice-Chairperson of the Patented Medicine Prices Review Board, during good behaviour for a term ending on October 5, 2028.N/A
subject: Designation of a Vice-Chairperson of the Patented Medicine Prices Review Board
precis: Designation of Peter Moreland-Giraldeau of Canmore, Alberta, a member of the Patented Medicine Prices Review Board, as Vice-Chairperson of the Patented Medicine Prices Review Board, during good behaviour for a term ending on October 5, 2028.
